arts.ttl: European club 'eye up' Leeds United ace in repeat of summer transfer trick
arts.sum: The report states that Chilean manager Jorge Sampaoli is looking for a long term replacement for Steve Mandanda, whose contract expires next summer, and Meslier is among their list of transfer targets. Meslier, who has been on the Whites' books since the summer of 2020, has established himself as the club's undisputed No 1.

arts.ttl: Middlesbrough selection boost for key duo that may have been missed after Burnley draw
arts.sum: Key duo George Edmundson and Ben Doak also made it through the game unscathed from a disciplinary viewpoint to hand Michael Carrick a huge selection boost ahead of Tuesday night's trip to Leeds United. Friday's game at Burnley was Boro's 19th game and therefore the cutoff point for which picking up five yellow cards results in a one-match suspension.

arts.ttl: Leeds: New Joe Rodon nickname revealed
arts.sum: It’s been a long time coming, but Joe Rodon finally has his first goal in Leeds United colours, heading home the opener against Derby County. Joe Rodon scores first Leeds goal in 2-0 win v Derby

arts.sum: Middlesbrough are the frontrunners to sign Aston Villa loanee Louie Barry in January, according to Darren Witcoop. Middlesbrough… The post Favourite named in winger pursuit amid Middlesbrough, Derby County links appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Chris Wilder: Leeds “miles ahead” of Sheff Utd
arts.sum: Leeds United closed their gap on Sheffield United as the Blades could only respond to Daniel Farke’s three points with a draw at West Brom, prompting Chris Wilder to again discuss the Whites. Sheffield United draw 2-2 at West Brom: Leeds close gap to one point

arts.ttl: Leeds United 'explore conditions of potential transfer' for USA star who rejected Olympic call-up
arts.sum: Championship frontrunners Leeds United are reportedly considering a move for Real Salt Lake's MLS Young Player of the Year, Diego Luna. Luna, who has previously caught the attention of clubs from Belgium, Italy, Holland and Spain, is now more sought-after than ever following a standout MLS season where he achieved career-best stats.

arts.ttl: Ben Doak sends Liverpool a clear message as Middlesbrough loan decision looms
arts.sum: Ben Doak made clear that he believes Middlesbrough is the best place for him right now as he sent a clear message to Liverpool bosses ahead of the January transfer window. I think we play some of the best football in the league and I think a lot of that comes down the right hand side.

arts.ttl: Leeds United behind closed doors plan that paid off in Elland Road moment
arts.sum: It's been a long time coming, but Joe Rodon's first goal in Leeds United colours owed much to the hard work put in at their Thorp Arch training round. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community
